_comment: Hand-labeled mapping: feed_id -> visual_profile label, applied AFTER YOLO inference. Pretrained COCO YOLO cannot tell a friendly FPV from any drone; it can only emit unknown_drone_like / background_or_noise. Promotion to known_friendly_* MUST come from a human who has confirmed via the HMAC marker that the feed is authenticated friendly. The HMAC marker is the source of truth; the visual signal is supporting evidence only.

FEED-A.label: known_friendly_fpv
FEED-A.rationale: Marker-authenticated and operator-confirmed FPV-class via manual review of the live feed. Visual signal corroborates the HMAC verdict; it does not produce it.
